support.title: Support Centre
support.subtitle: We're here to help you get the most out of ZARZOOM.
support.faq1q: How do I connect my social media accounts?
support.faq1a: Navigate to your Dashboard, click 'Connected Accounts', and follow the prompts to authorise each platform. We support Facebook, Instagram, X (Twitter), LinkedIn, and TikTok.
support.faq2q: Can I schedule posts in advance?
support.faq2a: Absolutely. Our calendar view lets you schedule content weeks or even months ahead. Simply create your post, pick a date and time, and ZARZOOM handles the rest.
support.faq3q: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
support.faq3a: You'll receive a notification when you approach your limit. You can upgrade your plan at any time from the Account Settings page, and the change takes effect immediately.
support.faq4a: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption for data at rest and in transit. We never share your data with third parties. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
support.contactText: Our support team typically responds within 24 hours on business days.

seo.title: About ZARZOOM - AI-Powered Social Media Automation
seo.description: Learn about ZARZOOM's mission to revolutionize social media management through intelligent automation and AI-driven content creation.

about.heroDescription: ZARZOOM is an AI-powered platform designed to help businesses and creators generate and publish social media content automatically — so you can focus on what you do best.

hero.title: About ZARZOOM
hero.subtitle: Revolutionizing social media management through intelligent automation and AI-powered content creation.

storySteps.title: The Idea
storySteps.text: Founded to solve a problem every creator faces — staying consistent on social media without burning out.

storySteps.title: Building the Platform
storySteps.text: We combined AI-powered content generation with smart scheduling to create a fully automated social media pipeline.

storySteps.title: Automation at Scale
storySteps.text: ZARZOOM now helps businesses and creators maintain a strong online presence — without the daily effort normally required.

helpCards.title: AI Content Generation
helpCards.text: Automatically generate engaging posts tailored to your brand voice and audience.

helpCards.title: Smart Scheduling
helpCards.text: Schedule and publish content across your social platforms at the optimal time.

helpCards.title: Consistent Online Presence
helpCards.text: Maintain visibility and grow your audience without the daily grind.

helpCards.title: Time-Saving Automation
helpCards.text: Focus on your business while ZARZOOM handles your entire content pipeline.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Removing the Biggest Barrier to Social Media Growth
mission.para1: Our mission is to remove the biggest barrier to social media growth — the constant demand for fresh content.
mission.para2: ZARZOOM uses artificial intelligence to automate content creation and publishing so entrepreneurs and businesses can focus on what they do best.
mission.para3: Instead of spending hours planning posts, writing content, and managing multiple platforms, ZARZOOM helps you stay visible online — effortlessly.

story.heading: Built to Solve a Real Problem
story.para1: ZARZOOM was created to solve a problem many founders and creators face — staying consistent on social media.
story.para2: While social media is one of the most powerful tools for building an audience, maintaining a steady stream of high-quality content is difficult and time-consuming.
story.para3: By combining AI-powered content generation with automated scheduling, ZARZOOM allows users to maintain a strong online presence without the daily effort normally required.

lookingAhead.heading: The Future of Social Media Growth
lookingAhead.para1: We believe the future of social media growth will be powered by intelligent automation.
lookingAhead.para2: ZARZOOM is continually evolving to help businesses and creators build their online presence faster and more effectively.
lookingAhead.para3: Our goal is simple: make powerful social media growth tools accessible to everyone.

intelligentAutomation.title: Intelligent Automation
intelligentAutomation.subtitle: Powered by cutting-edge AI to grow your audience while you focus on your business.

cta.title: Start Autopiloting Your Socials Today
cta.description: Join thousands of creators and businesses growing on autopilot.

innovation.title: Innovation First
innovation.description: We push the boundaries of AI and automation to deliver solutions that were impossible just yesterday. Our commitment to innovation means you always have access to the latest advancements in social media technology.

authenticity.title: Authentic Engagement
authenticity.description: Automation should enhance, not replace, genuine human connection. Our tools are designed to help you maintain your unique voice and build real relationships with your audience at scale.

simplicity.title: Simplicity & Power
simplicity.description: Sophisticated technology doesn't have to be complicated. We believe in making powerful tools accessible to everyone, regardless of technical expertise.

trust.title: Trust & Privacy
trust.description: Your data, your content, your community—we treat everything with the utmost respect and security. We never sell your data and maintain the highest standards of privacy protection.

team.title: Built by Experts
team.description: Our team combines decades of experience in AI, social media marketing, and user experience design. We're passionate about creating tools that truly make a difference in how businesses connect with their audiences.

seo.title: Features - ZARZOOM Social Media Automation
seo.description: Discover powerful features that automate your social media: AI content generation, smart scheduling, multi-platform posting, analytics, and more.

hero.title: Powerful Features
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to automate, optimize, and scale your social media presence—all in one intelligent platform.

aiContent.title: AI-Powered Content Generation
aiContent.description: Create engaging posts in seconds with our advanced AI that understands your brand voice, audience preferences, and trending topics. Generate captions, hashtags, and full post ideas that resonate with your community.

smartScheduling.title: Smart Scheduling & Autopilot
smartScheduling.description: Let our AI determine the optimal posting times for maximum engagement. Set your preferences once, and watch your social presence grow on autopilot while you focus on your business.

multiPlatform.title: Multi-Platform Management
multiPlatform.description: Manage all your social media accounts from one unified dashboard. Post to Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, and more with a single click.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics & Insights
analytics.description: Track what matters with comprehensive analytics that go beyond vanity metrics. Understand your audience, measure ROI, and make data-driven decisions to improve your strategy.

contentLibrary.title: Content Library & Assets
contentLibrary.description: Build and organize your content repository with our intelligent media library. Store images, videos, templates, and copy snippets for quick access and reuse.

collaboration.title: Team Collaboration
collaboration.description: Work seamlessly with your team, clients, or agencies. Assign roles, manage permissions, and streamline approval workflows all within the platform.

integration.title: Integrations & API
integration.description: Connect ZARZOOM with your existing tools and workflows. Our robust API and pre-built integrations ensure seamless data flow across your tech stack.

openClawIntegration.title: API & OpenClaw Integrations
openClawIntegration.description: Supercharge your workflow with ZARZOOM's powerful OpenClaw integration for on-demand automated social media creation and scheduling across 10 platforms. Trigger AI-powered content generation directly from your existing systems via our REST API, or let OpenClaw agents handle everything autonomously. Perfect for agencies, developers, and businesses wanting seamless automation.
features: On-demand AI content creation via API

support.title: World-Class Support
support.description: Get help when you need it with our dedicated support team. Access comprehensive documentation, video tutorials, and responsive customer service.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Social Media?
cta.description: Start your free trial and experience the power of intelligent automation.

termsUser.title: User Terms & Conditions
termsUser.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using ZARZOOM.
termsUser.s1Text: By creating an account or using the ZARZOOM platform, you agree to be bound by these User Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, you must not use the service.
termsUser.s2Text: You must provide accurate, complete information when registering. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account.
termsUser.s3Text: You agree not to use ZARZOOM to post content that is unlawful, defamatory, obscene, or infringes the intellectual property rights of others. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate this policy.
termsUser.s4Text: Paid plans are billed in advance on a monthly or annual basis. You may cancel at any time; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. Refunds are not provided for partial periods.
termsUser.s5Text: You retain ownership of content you create and publish through ZARZOOM. By using the platform, you grant us a limited licence to process, store, and display your content solely for the purpose of providing the service.
termsUser.s6Text: ZARZOOM is provided on an 'as-is' basis. To the fullest extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties and shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
termsUser.s7Text: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes are published constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

termsWebsite.title: Website Terms & Conditions
termsWebsite.subtitle: Terms governing your use of the zarzoom.com website.
termsWebsite.s1Text: This website is operated by ZARZOOM Ltd. By accessing and browsing this site, you accept these Website Terms & Conditions in full.
termsWebsite.s2Text: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of ZARZOOM Ltd or its licensors and is protected by copyright and trademark laws.
termsWebsite.s3Text: While we endeavour to keep the information on this site accurate and up to date, we make no warranties or representations about its completeness or accuracy.
termsWebsite.s4Text: This website may contain links to third-party sites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those sites.
termsWebsite.s5Text: These terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.s1Text: We collect information you provide directly (name, email, payment details) and information generated automatically (IP address, browser type, usage data) when you use ZARZOOM.
privacy.s2Text: We use your information to provide and improve the service, process payments, send service-related communications, and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.s3Text: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with trusted service providers (payment processors, hosting providers) who assist us in operating the platform, subject to strict confidentiality agreements.
privacy.s4Text: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the service. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting support.
privacy.s5Text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also object to processing or request data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@zarzoom.com.
privacy.s6Text: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data, including encryption, access controls, and regular security assessments.
privacy.s7Text: We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via email or through the platform.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: How we use cookies and similar technologies.
cookies.s1Text: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences and understand how you use it.
cookies.s2EssentialText: Required for the website to function properly. These cannot be disabled. They include session cookies and authentication tokens.
cookies.s2AnalyticsText: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting anonymous usage data. We use this to improve our service.
cookies.s2PreferenceText: Remember your settings and preferences (such as language choice) to provide a more personalised experience.
cookies.s3Text: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of the website.
cookies.s4Text: Some cookies are placed by third-party services that appear on our pages. We do not control these cookies. Please refer to the respective third-party privacy policies for more information.
cookies.s5Text: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at privacy@zarzoom.com.
